section.div: Admin Dashboard Template Built On Tailwind CSS

𝙀𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙍𝙚𝙥𝙡𝙞𝙩, 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙖𝙩 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙙𝙞𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙨𝙖𝙡. This is the single most extensive Replit module, allowing you to access various parts of the site with just a few classes and methods. Written in Python. Maintained by @BD103 & @JBYT27.
